description: Style NoteIn earthy tones, coolers comes up with this sharp pair of sandals for a great look this spring. Sandals needn't necessarily tone down your casual ensemble - this pair is the right choice to perfectly offset your summer look. Style this with fitted trousers or cargo shorts for maximum impact.Product DetailsBlack blunt toed sandal with criss-crossing forefoot straps and midfoot strapsHas a padded footbed with print and stitch detailHas a textured TPU outsole, flat sole with curved grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt
